3287050.name: Fate of the Three Kingdoms
3287050.description:
Fate of the Three Kingdoms is a turn base card game about the era of the Three Kingdoms.

Collect different heroes from the time ranging like Liu Bei, Cao Cao and Sun Jian. Deploy tactics that act as spells in traditional card games. Equip legendary weapons and horses or lay traps like Ambush or Empty City.

Play solo against the AI or online against other players. Complete the various solo campaign scenarios to earn rewards in game.

The objective of the game is to defeat the other player (AI or real) by bringing their total to 0 or less. This can be done by using your deployed units (hero cards) to attack them or by depleting their card stack to 0, each turn after cumulative damage is applied. You can earn coins to buy packs by playing online games against other players or completing the ten campaigns.

Early access will have the Shu, Wei and Wu factions with a total of 65 cards including some neutral characters and tactics. Plans would be to later on add factions led by Dong Zhuo, Yuan Shao and Ma Teng to name a few.
3287050.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
